# Prompts Collection - PS Theme

**Purpose**: Ready-to-use prompts for AI agents to work efficiently on PS Theme components.

---

## 📋 Available Prompts

### 🏗️ Component Creation

| Prompt | Purpose | Time |
|--------|---------|------|
| **[create-atom.md](create-atom.md)** | Create a new atom component (button, badge, icon, etc.) | 3-4h |
| **[create-molecule.md](create-molecule.md)** | Create a molecule (card, form-field, etc.) with Token-First | 4-6h |
| **[create-organism.md](create-organism.md)** | Create an organism (header, footer, grid, etc.) | 6-8h |

### ✅ Quality Assurance

| Prompt | Purpose | Time |
|--------|---------|------|
| **[audit-component.md](audit-component.md)** | Run complete 100-point conformity audit on any component | 20-30min |
| **[fix-component.md](fix-component.md)** | Fix failing component with step-by-step validation | 1-2h |
| **[standardize-legacy.md](standardize-legacy.md)** | Migrate legacy component to v4.0.0 standards | 2-4h |

### 🔧 Maintenance

| Prompt | Purpose | Time |
|--------|---------|------|
| **[create-token.md](create-token.md)** | Propose new design token with complete workflow | 2-5 days |
| **[refactor-css.md](refactor-css.md)** | Convert flat CSS to nested with tokens | 30-60min |
| **[update-storybook.md](update-storybook.md)** | Add/update Storybook stories with Autodocs | 30-45min |

### 📊 Analysis

| Prompt | Purpose | Time |
|--------|---------|------|
| **[analyze-project.md](analyze-project.md)** | Generate comprehensive project status report | 15-30min |
| **[check-accessibility.md](check-accessibility.md)** | Run WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit | 30-60min |
| **[find-issues.md](find-issues.md)** | Identify technical debt and issues across project | 20-40min |

---

## 🚀 How to Use

1. **Choose a prompt** matching your task
2. **Copy the prompt content**
3. **Replace placeholders** (e.g., `{COMPONENT_NAME}` → `badge`)
4. **Paste to AI agent** (GitHub Copilot, Claude, ChatGPT)
5. **Follow the workflow** generated by the AI

---

## 📚 Documentation Reference

All prompts reference consolidated instructions:

- **01-core-principles.md** - Foundations (Atomic Design, BEM, tokens)
- **02-component-development.md** - Complete workflow (11 steps)
- **03-technical-implementation.md** - Code standards
- **04-quality-assurance.md** - Validation (100-point audit)
- **05-maintenance.md** - Evolution (tokens, migrations)

---

## 🎯 Prompt Quality Standards

All prompts follow these principles:

✅ **Clear objective** - Single, well-defined goal  
✅ **Context-aware** - Reference project structure and standards  
✅ **Step-by-step** - Actionable workflow with validation  
✅ **Self-contained** - Can be used independently  
✅ **Examples included** - Real-world examples from PS Theme  
✅ **Validation built-in** - Success criteria defined
